deep_house.name: Deep House
deep_house.prompt_template: Deep House, soulful vibe, smooth bassline, warm pads, {idea}, DJ-friendly with clear intro and outro

tech_house.name: Tech House
tech_house.description: 科技感、节奏感强、适合主舞台
tech_house.prompt_template: Tech House, driving beat, rolling bassline, crisp percussion, {idea}, DJ-ready with clear structure

progressive_house.name: Progressive House
progressive_house.description: 旋律化、渐进式、情感丰富
progressive_house.prompt_template: Progressive House, melodic, uplifting, atmospheric build-ups, emotional chords, {idea}, perfect for journey mixing

funky_house.name: Funky House
funky_house.prompt_template: Funky House, funky guitar riffs, disco samples, groovy bassline, {idea}, feel-good party vibe

techno.name: Techno
techno.description: 极简、工业感、适合仓库派对
techno.prompt_template: Techno, minimalist, industrial vibe, hypnotic rhythm, {idea}, dark and driving

industrial_techno.name: Industrial Techno
industrial_techno.prompt_template: Industrial Techno, hard-hitting, noisy textures, heavy percussion, {idea}, warehouse ready

melodic_techno.name: Melodic Techno
melodic_techno.prompt_template: Melodic Techno, emotional melodies, arpeggiated synths, atmospheric pads, {idea}, cinematic and beautiful

acid_techno.name: Acid Techno
acid_techno.prompt_template: Acid Techno, squelchy 303 basslines, classic acid vibe, {idea}, retro-futuristic

trance.name: Trance
trance.prompt_template: Trance, uplifting, euphoric melodies, epic breakdowns, {idea}, emotional and uplifting

psytrance.name: Psytrance
psytrance.description: 迷幻、快速节奏、精神之旅
psytrance.prompt_template: Psytrance, psychedelic, swirling arpeggios, driving bass, {idea}, mind-bending trip

drum_and_bass.name: Drum & Bass
drum_and_bass.description: 快速鼓点、重低音、能量十足
drum_and_bass.prompt_template: Drum & Bass, fast breakbeats, heavy basslines, {idea}, high energy and dynamic

practice_track.name: 练习专用
practice_track.description: 专为新手练习设计，鼓点清晰
practice_track.prompt_template: Practice track for DJ beginners, extremely clear kick drum, simple 4/4 beat, minimal elements, {idea}, perfect for beatmatching practice
